desc: a `.debounce(N)` statement handler that reads $event (`@input.debounce(300)="$data.q = $event.target.value"`) is wrapped in a thunk so the script-lifted wrap is a FUNCTION with its own $event param — vue `debounce(($event) => {…})`, svelte a parenthesized IIFE thunk (Spike-012 R3-1 structural); pre-fix vue/svelte lifted the raw assignment to script scope where $event is undefined (free $event). React drops $event from the debounce deps[] (was a free `[$event]`).
